statement.en: Monstrous Moonshine (Conway-Norton 1979, Borcherds 1992): the Fourier coefficients of the modular j-invariant j(τ) equal linear combinations of dimensions of irreducible representations of the Monster sporadic group. First coefficient: 196884 = 196883 + 1. Proven (Fields Medal 1998) but deeper explanation via vertex operator algebras remains active research.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Bridge between finite group and modular form
reiTyping.rationale: Borcherds 1992 proof via Monster vertex algebra

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Main theorem solved; generalizations (umbral moonshine) active
